pi_items.source: Task description lists 6 soiling values and 7 degradation values (6 * 7 = 42). Confirmed in verifier.py expectation.
Found explicitly in the generated client_system_report.json from setup_task.sh and in the task description.
verifier.py checks best_fit_error_max_pct explicitly with a default of 10.0 for partial scoring.
Explicitly defined as the ground truth in setup_task.sh comments ("soiling=8%/yr") and used as gt_soiling in verifier.py logic.
Explicitly defined as the ground truth in setup_task.sh comments ("degradation=0.9%/yr") and used as gt_degradation in verifier.py logic.
The Year 1 capacity factor calculated from the report (42,500 kWh / 25 kW / 8760 hr) is 19.41%, which analytically falls within the 18% to 30% bound for this location.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated PV system report located at /home/ga/client_system_report.json. The expected parameter sweep involves 42 discrete combinations (6 soiling rates x 7 degradation rates). The ground truth parameters for the Year 4 underperformance are physically defined as an 8.0% soiling loss and 0.9% annual degradation, which explain the observed 35,290 kWh production at the Las Vegas site (Lat: 36.17, Lon: -115.14).
